description_long: This is a classic single-propeller military airplane with a streamlined fuselage and elliptical wings, painted in a green camouflage pattern. The wings feature roundels with red centers and blue outer rings, typical of Royal Air Force markings, while the fuselage bears a yellow and blue roundel near the tail. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy and positioned just ahead of the wing's midpoint. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer, both painted in the same green as the rest of the body. The propeller at the nose is black with a metallic hub, and the landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retracted or not modeled.
description: A green, single-propeller military airplane with elliptical wings and RAF-style roundels, featuring an enclosed cockpit and streamlined design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the elliptical wings, propeller, and nose details with visible roundels on the wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cockpit canopy, fuselage roundel, and the full length of the wing and tail.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, both wing roundels, and the cockpit placement.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite fuselage roundel, cockpit, and tail profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight elliptical wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a three-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable or omitted in this model.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy just ahead of the wing's midpoint.
